milestone: 日本製造販賣業者（MAH）。2026/06/18 向神奈川縣申請 MAH 業許可、2026/06/24 向 PMDA 遞交 Stemchymal 製造販賣承認申請（適應症 SCA3、SCA6），走約 9 個月優先審查。

en.milestone: Japanese marketing authorisation holder. Filed for the MAH business licence with Kanagawa Prefecture on 2026/06/18 and submitted the Stemchymal marketing approval application to PMDA on 2026/06/24 (indications SCA3 and SCA6), under a ~9-month priority review.

modality: iPSC 衍生多巴胺神經前驅細胞
milestone: 2026/03/06 日本厚生勞動省授予附條件期限核准，適應症為對既有療法（含左旋多巴）反應不佳的帕金森病運動症狀——與 RiHEART 並列全球首批 iPSC 衍生細胞治療核准案。Ph1/2 為 7 人植入，4 人見運動功能改善、無相關嚴重不良事件。

en.milestone: On 2026/03/06 Japan's MHLW granted conditional, time-limited approval for motor symptoms of Parkinson's disease in patients not responding to existing therapy including levodopa — together with RiHEART, among the world's first approved iPSC-derived cell therapies. The Ph1/2 implanted 7 patients, with motor improvement in 4 and no related serious adverse events.

milestone: 2026/03/06 獲日本附條件期限核准（心衰竭），與 AMCHEPRY 並列全球首批 iPSC 療法。iPS 心肌細胞片外科貼附於心臟表面，促進血管新生。公開報導之日本國內價格為 5,320 萬日圓（約 32.6 萬美元）；2026 年秋季在日本上市。

en.milestone: Received Japanese conditional, time-limited approval on 2026/03/06 (heart failure), alongside AMCHEPRY as among the world's first iPSC therapies. Sheets of iPSC-derived cardiomyocytes are surgically applied to the heart surface to promote vascularisation. Reported Japanese price is ¥53.2 million (about US$326,400); launch in Japan planned for autumn 2026.

milestone: 2026 年 3 月底於信州大學醫院完成 HS-005 首例給藥（EMERALD Ph1/2，擴張型心肌病），為全球首例以導管投與 iPS 心肌細胞球；每 cohort 7 人、共 14 人。既有主力 HS-001 需開胸手術，HS-005 改為經心內膜導管、侵入性較低。

en.milestone: Dosed the first HS-005 patient at Shinshu University Hospital in late March 2026 (EMERALD Ph1/2, dilated cardiomyopathy) — the world's first catheter administration of iPSC-derived cardiomyocyte spheroids; 7 patients per cohort, 14 in total. Its earlier lead HS-001 requires open-heart surgery, while HS-005 uses a less invasive endocardial catheter.

modality: 體細胞（多能成體前驅細胞）與 iPSC
milestone: 以急性呼吸窘迫症候群（ARDS）為主軸，已於日本遞交全球 Ph3 試驗計畫（REVIVE-ARDS，隨機安慰劑對照、最多 550 人，主要終點為無呼吸器天數），策略上尋求依 Ph2 結果在日本取得附條件期限核准；另有缺血性腦中風與外傷適應症、以及 iPSC 衍生基因改造殺手細胞平台。

en.modality: Somatic (multipotent adult progenitor) cells and iPSC
en.milestone: Centred on acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS): a global Ph3 trial plan has been filed in Japan (REVIVE-ARDS, randomised placebo-controlled, up to 550 patients, primary endpoint ventilator-free days), with a strategy of seeking conditional, time-limited approval in Japan on the Ph2 results; also pursuing ischaemic stroke and trauma, plus an iPSC-derived gene-engineered killer cell platform.

modality: iPSC 衍生角膜內皮細胞
milestone: 2023/03 於日本再生醫療學會年會發表首例人體移植（iPS 衍生角膜內皮細胞替代物）結果：術後 3 個月未見不良事件，視力、角膜中央與最薄厚度呈改善趨勢。現正籌備日本公司主導試驗與全球試驗。

en.milestone: Reported the first-in-human transplant at the Japanese Society for Regenerative Medicine annual meeting in 2023/03: no adverse events at 3 months, with trends toward improved visual acuity and central/thinnest corneal thickness. Company-sponsored Japanese and global trials are in preparation.

modality: iPSC 衍生胰島細胞等再生細胞平台
milestone: 武田與京大 iPS 細胞研究所 T-CiRA 合作衍生的再生醫療公司，聚焦 iPSC 衍生細胞治療平台（含胰島細胞方向）。公開資訊有限，以官網管線為準。

en.modality: iPSC-derived islet and other regenerative cell platforms
en.milestone: A regenerative-medicine company spun out of the Takeda–CiRA (T-CiRA) collaboration, focused on iPSC-derived cell therapy platforms including islet cells. Public information is limited; refer to the company pipeline.

milestone: 2020/10/13 與 Steminent 簽署韓國獨家授權，取得 Stemchymal 於 polyQ 型脊髓小腦萎縮症（PolyQ SCA）在韓國的臨床開發與商業化權利；對價含預付金、法規里程碑金與兩位數銷售權利金。自有平台為純系分離（clonal isolation）MSC。

en.milestone: Signed an exclusive Korean licence with Steminent on 2020/10/13 for clinical development and commercialisation of Stemchymal in polyglutamine spinocerebellar ataxia in South Korea; terms include an upfront payment, regulatory milestones and a double-digit royalty. Its own platform is clonally isolated MSC.

milestone: NeuroNata-R 於 2014 年取得韓國附條件核准用於肌萎縮性側索硬化症（ALS），是神經退化領域少數已上市的 MSC 產品；2026/05 韓國食藥處在完成第三期試驗資料後維持其附條件核准並更新仿單。

en.milestone: NeuroNata-R received Korean conditional approval in 2014 for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, one of the few marketed MSC products in neurodegeneration; in 2026/05 the MFDS maintained the conditional approval and updated the label after the completed Phase 3.

milestone: Cartistem 於 2012 年 1 月取得韓國食藥處核准，用於膝關節軟骨缺損，是異體臍帶血 MSC 商業化的早期案例；公司另有神經退化方向的細胞治療研發。

en.milestone: Cartistem was approved by Korea's MFDS in January 2012 for knee cartilage defects, an early example of commercialised allogeneic cord-blood MSC; the company also runs cell-therapy research in neurodegeneration.

modality: 異體 MSC ＋ 細胞/基因 CDMO
milestone: EN001 於 2025/03 取得 FDA 孤兒藥資格（夏柯-馬里-杜斯氏病 CMT）；Ph1 未見劑量限制毒性或輸注相關反應，已進入 Ph1b/2a（NCT06328712，CMT1A），並將適應症擴及裘馨氏肌失養症與肌少症。兼營細胞與基因治療 CDMO。

en.milestone: EN001 received FDA orphan drug designation in 2025/03 for Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease; the Ph1 showed no dose-limiting toxicity or infusion-related reactions, and it has advanced to Ph1b/2a (NCT06328712, CMT1A), with expansion into Duchenne muscular dystrophy and sarcopenia. It also operates a cell and gene therapy CDMO.

modality: 多能幹細胞衍生多巴胺前驅細胞
milestone: 以 GMP 條件自人類胚胎幹細胞製備高純度腹側中腦多巴胺前驅細胞。2025/07 公布帕金森病 Ph1/2a 12 人移植後一年安全性與療效數據為正面；2026/02 與 Catalent 建立開發與製造夥伴關係。長期追蹤試驗 NCT06477744。

en.milestone: Produces high-purity ventral midbrain dopaminergic progenitors from human embryonic stem cells under GMP. In 2025/07 it reported positive safety and efficacy data one year after transplantation in 12 Parkinson's patients (Ph1/2a); in 2026/02 it entered a development and manufacturing partnership with Catalent. Long-term follow-up trial NCT06477744.

milestone: Cellgram-AMI（急性心肌梗塞）為韓國最早核准的幹細胞藥品之一（2011），常被引用為全球首個獲核准的間質幹細胞藥；公司另營細胞治療 CDMO 與原料事業。細節請以官網與韓國食藥處公告為準。

en.milestone: Cellgram-AMI (acute myocardial infarction) was among the first stem cell drugs approved in Korea (2011) and is often cited as the world's first approved mesenchymal stem cell drug; the company also runs cell-therapy CDMO and materials businesses. Verify details against the company site and MFDS announcements.

milestone: 以脂肪來源間質幹細胞在韓國食藥處架構下完成商業化的代表企業（Cupistem 用於克隆氏症肛瘻管）——與本社同屬脂肪 MSC 來源。核准細節請以官網與韓國食藥處公告為準。

en.milestone: A leading example of commercialising adipose-derived mesenchymal stem cells under Korea's MFDS framework (Cupistem for Crohn's fistula) — the same cell source as Steminent's. Verify approval details against the company site and MFDS announcements.

milestone: 以臍帶血來源 MSC 平台開發罕病與發炎性疾病療法（如異位性皮膚炎）。公開資訊有限，管線與進度以官網為準。

en.milestone: Develops therapies for rare and inflammatory disorders (such as atopic dermatitis) on a cord-blood MSC platform. Public information is limited; refer to the company site for pipeline and status.

modality: 免疫細胞與 MSC 平台、CDMO
milestone: 以臍帶血銀行、全球細胞製造與 CDMO 基礎設施為主體的集團型企業，涵蓋免疫細胞與 MSC 平台。公開資訊有限，以官網為準。

en.modality: Immune cell and MSC platforms, CDMO
en.milestone: A group company built around cord-blood banking, global cell manufacturing and CDMO infrastructure, spanning immune cell and MSC platforms. Public information is limited; refer to the company site.

modality: 培養組織細胞（角質細胞／纖維母細胞）
milestone: 韓國組織工程與細胞製劑商業化的早期案例（培養皮膚細胞產品）。核准年份與適應症請以官網與韓國食藥處公告為準。

en.milestone: An early Korean example of commercialised tissue engineering and cell products (cultured skin cell products). Verify approval years and indications against the company site and MFDS announcements.

milestone: 2024/12/18 獲 FDA 核准，用於 2 個月以上兒童的類固醇難治性急性移植物抗宿主病——首個獲 FDA 核准的間質幹細胞（MSC）產品。核准歷程含 BLA 重新遞交與 PDUFA 展延，是異體 MSC 的 BLA 審查與 CMC 放大量產的關鍵先例。

en.milestone: Approved by the FDA on 2024/12/18 for steroid-refractory acute graft-versus-host disease in children aged 2 months and older — the first FDA-approved mesenchymal stem cell product. The path included a BLA resubmission and PDUFA extension, making it the key precedent for allogeneic MSC BLA review and CMC scale-up.

milestone: 以 iPSC 為起始細胞量產 MSC，訴求批次一致性與可規模化。CYP-001（急性 GvHD）隨機雙盲 Ph2 已完成全部 65 人的 100 天主要評估期，頂線數據預計 2026/06；CYP-004（膝骨關節炎）Ph3 結果預計 2026/05。

en.milestone: Manufactures MSC from iPSC starting material, claiming batch consistency and scalability. The randomised double-blind Ph2 of CYP-001 in acute GvHD completed the 100-day primary evaluation for all 65 participants, with topline expected 2026/06; Ph3 results for CYP-004 in knee osteoarthritis are expected 2026/05.

modality: 自體 MSC-NTF（分泌神經營養因子）
milestone: 神經退化疾病自體 MSC 的代表案例。第一個 Ph3 已完成；2025/05 取得 FDA 同意啟動 Ph3b（ENDURANCE）並以特殊試驗計畫評估（SPA）協議定案設計：約 200 名症狀未滿兩年的中度 ALS 患者，24 週隨機雙盲對照後接 24 週開放延伸。2026/02 已完成募資、備妥啟動。

en.milestone: A leading case of autologous MSC in neurodegeneration. The first Ph3 is complete; in 2025/05 the FDA cleared a Ph3b (ENDURANCE) with the design settled under a Special Protocol Assessment: about 200 patients with moderate ALS and under two years of symptoms, 24 weeks randomised double-blind followed by a 24-week open-label extension. Financing was secured and start-up preparations were under way as of 2026/02.

milestone: 裘馨氏肌失養症心肌病變。2025 年先收到完全回覆信（FDA 要求補療效資料），其後 FDA 撤回該 CRL 並恢復 BLA 審查，新 PDUFA 目標日 2026/08/22，並已排定細胞、組織與基因治療諮詢委員會會議；重新遞交納入 Ph3 HOPE-3 結果。是罕病細胞治療走 RMAT／加速審查的活教材。

en.milestone: For Duchenne muscular dystrophy cardiomyopathy. It received a Complete Response Letter in 2025 (the FDA sought more efficacy data); the FDA subsequently lifted that CRL and resumed BLA review with a new PDUFA target of 2026/08/22, and an advisory committee meeting has been scheduled; the resubmission includes Ph3 HOPE-3 results. A live case study of RMAT and accelerated review for rare-disease cell therapy.

modality: 多能幹細胞衍生神經元
milestone: 帕金森病神經元replacement。已在 exPDite-2 註冊型 Ph3 完成首例給藥（NCT06944522）——為異體多能幹細胞衍生療法在帕金森病的首個 Ph3 樞紐試驗；收案至多 102 人、美國 7 個站點，主要終點為 78 週的每日「ON 時間（無困擾異動症）」，數據預計 2027。36 個月追蹤持續見正面效果。

en.milestone: Neuronal replacement in Parkinson's disease. The first patient has been dosed in the registrational exPDite-2 Ph3 (NCT06944522) — the first pivotal Ph3 of an allogeneic pluripotent stem cell-derived therapy in Parkinson's; up to 102 patients at 7 US sites, primary endpoint change in daily ON time without troublesome dyskinesia over 78 weeks, data expected 2027. Positive effects continued at 36 months of follow-up.

milestone: 罕見神經疾病商業化與終點設定的重量級參照（含 Friedreich's ataxia 的 Skyclarys 與脊髓性肌肉萎縮症的 Spinraza）。SCA 方面：BIIB132（SCA3 ASO）已於 2023/04 終止——詳見競品全景。

en.milestone: A heavyweight reference for rare neurological commercialisation and endpoint design (including Skyclarys in Friedreich's ataxia and Spinraza in spinal muscular atrophy). In SCA, BIIB132 (SCA3 ASO) was discontinued in 2023/04 — see the competitive landscape.

milestone: RNA 標的中樞神經藥物的領導者，是 CNS 遞送與 ASO 安全性的主要參照；MSA 的 ION464（BIIB101）由合作方 Biogen 於 2025/02 宣布終止。

en.milestone: A leader in RNA-targeted CNS medicines and the main reference for CNS delivery and ASO safety; in MSA, ION464 (BIIB101) was discontinued by partner Biogen in 2025/02.

milestone: 以小樣本罕病族群的試驗執行與法規互動著稱，多項罕病藥物已取得核准，是罕病開發營運面的參照對象。

en.milestone: Known for executing trials and managing regulatory interactions in very small rare-disease cohorts, with several approved rare-disease products — an operational reference for rare-disease development.

milestone: AMT-130 為亨丁頓舞蹈症（polyQ 疾病）AAV 基因療法，是 polyQ 領域「一次性基因療法能否改變病程與其持久性」的主要參照——詳見競品全景。

en.milestone: AMT-130 is an AAV gene therapy for Huntington's disease (a polyQ disorder) and the main reference for whether a one-time gene therapy can modify a polyQ disease and how durable that effect is — see the competitive landscape.
